2. Multimodal References

Dreamina Seedance 2.0 lets you use image, video, audio, and text references at the same time, with support for up to 12 files in one workflow.

So instead of trying to force everything out of one loose prompt, you can give it way more to work with from https://t.co/Mc3TVm80lS
